languages.text: "Все просто. Я один из самых опытных бойцов и я знаком с трюками Погонщицы. И готов рискнуть головой, чтобы спасти Клеть. Искупление для одного".
"It's simple. I'm one of the most experienced fighters and I'm familiar with the Drover's tricks. And I'm willing to risk my neck to save the Cage. Atonement for the one."
languages.original_text: "Все просто. Я один из самых опытных бойцов и я знаком с трюками Погонщицы. И готов рискнуть головой, чтобы спасти Клеть. Искупление для одного".

traits.locale_text: "It's simple. I'm one of the most experienced fighters and I'm familiar with the Drover's tricks. And I'm willing to risk my head to save the Cage. Atonement for the one."
"It's simple. I'm one of the most experienced fighters and I'm familiar with the Drover's tricks. And I'm willing to risk my neck to save the Cage. Atonement for the one."
"It's simple. I'm one of the most experienced fighters and I'm familiar with the Drover's tricks. And I'm willing to risk my head to save Tsar-Cage. Freedom for the one."
"It's simple. I'm one of the most experienced fighters and I'm familiar with the Drover's tricks. And I'm willing to risk my head to save the Cage. Atonement for the one."
"It's simple. I'm one of the most experienced fighters and I'm familiar with the Drover's tricks. And I'm willing to risk my neck to save the Cage. Atonement for the one."

languages.text: 「簡単です。私は最も経験豊富な戦士の一人であり、ドルーバーの策略に精通しています。そして、ツァー・ケージを救うために命を危険にさらす覚悟です。一人に自由を。」
languages.original_text: "It's simple. I'm one of the most experienced fighters and I'm familiar with the Drover's tricks. And I'm willing to risk my head to save Tsar-Cage. Freedom for the one."

traits.locale_text: 「簡単です。私は最も経験豊富な戦士の一人であり、ドルーバーの策略に精通しています。そして、ツァー・ケージを救うために命を危険にさらす覚悟です。一人に自由を。」

languages.text: "Çok basit. Ben en deneyimli dövüşçülerden biriyim ve Çoban'ın numaralarına aşinayım. Kafes'i kurtarmak için boynumu ortaya koymaya hazırım. Sona kalana kefaret."
languages.original_text: "It's simple. I'm one of the most experienced fighters and I'm familiar with the Drover's tricks. And I'm willing to risk my neck to save the Cage. Atonement for the one."

traits.locale_text: "Çok basit. Ben en deneyimli dövüşçülerden biriyim ve Çoban'ın numaralarına aşinayım. Kafes'i kurtarmak için boynumu ortaya koymaya hazırım. Sona kalana kefaret."

languages.text: «Muy sencillo: soy uno de los guerreros más veteranos y conozco los trucos del Pastor. Y estoy dispuesto a arriesgar mi vida para salvar la Jaula. Expiación para el último».
languages.original_text: "It's simple. I'm one of the most experienced fighters and I'm familiar with the Drover's tricks. And I'm willing to risk my neck to save the Cage. Atonement for the one."

traits.locale_text: «Muy sencillo: soy uno de los guerreros más veteranos y conozco los trucos del Pastor. Y estoy dispuesto a arriesgar mi vida para salvar la Jaula. Expiación para el último».

languages.text: “很简单。我是这里经验最丰富的战士之一，对拒生花的伎俩了如指掌。而且我愿意豁出命去拯救牢笼。为了一人之赎。”
languages.original_text: "It's simple. I'm one of the most experienced fighters and I'm familiar with the Drover's tricks. And I'm willing to risk my neck to save the Cage. Atonement for the one."

traits.locale_text: “很简单。我是这里经验最丰富的战士之一，对拒生花的伎俩了如指掌。而且我愿意豁出命去拯救牢笼。为了一人之赎。”

languages.text: « C'est très simple : je suis l'un de nos combattants les plus expérimentés, je connais bien les ruses du Chasseur et je suis prêt à risquer ma vie pour sauver la Cage. Expiation pour un seul. »
languages.original_text: "It's simple. I'm one of the most experienced fighters and I'm familiar with the Drover's tricks. And I'm willing to risk my neck to save the Cage. Atonement for the one."

traits.locale_text: « C'est très simple : je suis l'un de nos combattants les plus expérimentés, je connais bien les ruses du Chasseur et je suis prêt à risquer ma vie pour sauver la Cage. Expiation pour un seul. »

languages.text: "Ganz einfach. Ich bin einer unserer erfahrensten Kämpfer und kenne die Tricks des Treibers. Und ich bin bereit, meinen Hals zu riskieren, um den Käfig zu retten. Sühne für den Einzelnen."
languages.original_text: "It's simple. I'm one of the most experienced fighters and I'm familiar with the Drover's tricks. And I'm willing to risk my neck to save the Cage. Atonement for the one."

traits.locale_text: "Ganz einfach. Ich bin einer unserer erfahrensten Kämpfer und kenne die Tricks des Treibers. Und ich bin bereit, meinen Hals zu riskieren, um den Käfig zu retten. Sühne für den Einzelnen."
